description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe featuring a broad, symmetrical blade on each side, both with a slightly curved cutting edge and a central notch at the top. The blades are matte black, giving the axe a modern, tactical appearance, and are joined at a robust central hub. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of dark wood, providing a strong contrast to the metallic head. The handle is straight, with no visible grip enhancements or curvature, and is proportionally thick to support the heavy head. There are no visible decorative elements, engravings, or branding on either the blade or the handle. The overall design is utilitarian, suggesting functionality and durability for heavy-duty use.
description: A double-headed black battle axe with a straight, dark wooden handle and broad, symmetrical blades. The design is robust and utilitarian, with no visible markings or decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing both wide, curved blades and the full length of the straight handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blades and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying both blades and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin blade profile and straight handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical, dark wooden handle with a smooth finish and no visible grip features.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, symmetrical, broad blades with curved edges and a central notch at the top; matte black finish.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted over the handle's end.
